title: Presentation: Hidden Decisions You Don’t Know You’re Making

Learn to identify the "decision behind the decision" to better incentivize high-performing teams and careers. By Shawna Martell, Dan Fike

title: GitHub Will Use Copilot Interaction Data from Free, Pro, and Pro+ Users to Train AI Models
summary: GitHub will use Copilot interaction data from Free, Pro, and Pro+ users to train AI models starting April 24, opting in by default.
